investment_limits.minimum_application_amount:
For normal investors - Rs. 10 lakh and in multiples of Re. 1 thereafter subject to the minimum investment threshold guidelines as per the SIF framework. 
For accredited investors - Rs. 1,00,000
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_amount:
Rs. 10,000 and in multiples of Re. 1 thereafter.
The redemption will be subject to compliance with provisions mentioned under “Minimum investment threshold”
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_units: No minimum redemption criterion for Unit based redemption

exit_load:
For redemption/switch-out of units on or before 90 days from the date of allotment: 0.50% of applicable NAV.
For redemption/switch-out of units after 90 days from the date of allotment: Nil.
